Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

TextBlock.Text: Overriding Formation Orders Using Direct Control

Run.Text: Direct Control can be useful in situations where you want to quickly unmask train-limited launchers to engage incoming enemy missiles, or to prevent ships from sailing towards landmasses.
Ships have a built-in collision avoidance routine and will generally be able to prevent collisions but sometimes it's more expedient to issue these orders yourself.
